nasb.text: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves; But when they perish, the righteous increase.

esv.text: When the wicked rise, people hide themselves, but when they perish, the righteous increase.

cnv.text: 惡人興起的時候，人就躲避； 惡人滅亡的時候，義人就增多。

ccb.text: 恶人当道，人人躲藏； 恶人灭亡，义人增多。

csbs.text: 恶人兴起时，世人就躲藏； 恶人灭亡时，义人就增多。
